results.rendered_html:
kūba(va)ra a. (rī f.)
1 Beautiful, agreeable.
2 Hump-backed.
— raḥ, -raṃ The pole of a carriage to which the yoke is fixed.
— raḥ A hump-backed man.
— rī
1 A carriage covered with a cloth or blanket.
2 The pole of a carriage to which the yoke is fixed;  Ve. 4.
